{% extends "marketplace/vendor/base.html" %} {% load i18n %} {% block title %}{% trans "我的分类" %} · {{ vendor.company_name }}{% endblock %} {% block extra_vendor_css %} .vendor-unified-shell { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:20px; } .vendor-hero { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#7c3aed 55%,#c084fc); border-radius:28px; color:#fff; padding:26px; box-shadow:0 18px 45px rgba(15,23,42,.22); } .vendor-hero-actions .btn { border-radius:999px; padding:12px 20px; font-weight:700; } .vendor-panel-card { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:24px; box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,.06); } .vendor-table thead th { font-size:.76rem; letter-spacing:.06em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; border-bottom:none; } .vendor-table tbody td { padding:18px 16px; vertical-align:middle; } .vendor-row-title { font-weight:800; color:#0f172a; } .vendor-actions { display:flex; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center; } .vendor-actions .btn { border-radius:999px; } .cat-section-tabs { display:flex; gap:8px; padding:18px; flex-wrap:wrap; } .cat-section-tabs a { border-radius:999px; padding:8px 18px; font-weight:700; font-size:.85rem; text-decoration:none; border:1.5px solid #e2e8f0; color:#475569; } .cat-section-tabs a.active { background:#7c3aed; border-color:#7c3aed; color:#fff; } .cat-section-title { font-weight:800; font-size:1.05rem; color:#0f172a; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; margin-bottom:4px; } .cat-section-hint { color:#64748b; font-size:.85rem; margin-bottom:16px; } /* Modern card grid for platform (read-only) categories */ .platform-cat-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap:14px; } .platform-cat-card { background:#fff; border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,.16); border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; display:flex; flex-direction:column; transition:transform .18s ease, box-shadow .18s ease; } .platform-cat-card:hover { transform:translateY(-3px); box-shadow:0 14px 30px rgba(15,23,42,.10); } .platform-cat-media { width:100%; height:100px; object-fit:cover; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#c084fc); } .platform-cat-media-fallback { width:100%; height:100px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#c084fc); color:#fff; font-size:1.6rem; } .platform-cat-body { padding:14px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; } .platform-cat-name { font-weight:800; color:#0f172a; font-size:.95rem; line-height:1.25; } .platform-cat-desc { color:#64748b; font-size:.78rem; line-height:1.4; display:-webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp:2; -webkit-box-orient:vertical; overflow:hidden; min-height:2.1em; } .platform-cat-count { align-self:flex-start; font-size:.74rem; font-weight:700; padding:4px 11px; border-radius:999px; background:#f1f5f9; color:#475569; } .platform-cat-empty { grid-column:1/-1; text-align:center; padding:40px 20px; color:#94a3b8; } {% endblock %} {% block vendor_content %}
{% trans "分类工作台" %}

{% trans "我的分类" %}

{% trans "创建您自己的分类，独立于平台管理员的分类，用于您的商品、课程与超市商品。" %}

{% trans "新增分类" %}
{% for value, label in section_choices %} {% if value == 'products' %}{% trans "商品" %}{% elif value == 'courses' %}{% trans "课程" %}{% else %}{% trans "超市" %}{% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% for category in categories %} {% empty %} {% endfor %}
{% trans "分类名称" %} {% trans "描述" %} {% trans "数量" %} {% trans "操作" %}
{{ category.name }} {{ category.description|default:"" }} {{ category.item_count }}
{% trans "编辑" %}
{% csrf_token %}
{% trans "暂无分类" %}
{% trans "平台分类" %}
{% for category in admin_categories %}
{% if category.image %} {% else %}
{% endif %}
{{ category.name }}
{{ category.description|default:"" }}
{{ category.item_count }}
{% empty %}
{% trans "暂无分类" %}
{% endfor %}
{% endblock %}
